conventions.translation: child origin expressed in parent-frame axes, metres
conventions.rotation: unit quaternion WXYZ rotating child-frame vectors into parent-frame vectors

frames.body_frd: PX4 aircraft body: origin at aircraft centre; +X forward, +Y right, +Z down
frames.oak_mount: OAK CAM_A/RGB reference origin using DepthAI RDF axes: +X right, +Y down, +Z forward
frames.oak_rgb_camera_optical_frame: DepthAI ROS aligned RGB/depth optical frame under the current rs_compat profile: +X right, +Y down, +Z forward
frames.hflow_flow_frd: H-Flow optical-flow focal-point frame configured with PX4 rotation 0
frames.hflow_range_frd: H-Flow range-origin frame configured with PX4 rotation 0

provenance.referencePoint: aircraft centre to OAK CAM_A/RGB reference origin; exact lens/reference point requires confirmation
